REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT THE APPLICATION WAS COMPLETE (CC 2923.6(H)) AND TO ALLEGE DAMAGES; DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS RE: UNLAWFUL/UNFAIR/FRAUDULENT PRONGS. DEMURER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THE TENTATIVE APPROVED AS TO FORM OR IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: N. WONG; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Anton Abramyan, Esq. (818-230-3220) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Ferdinand Posas through Court Call.
James Magid, Esq. (415-318-8825) for Defendant/Moving party SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., and NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Defendant ARGUED. Plaintiff has nothing to add to his arguments already on the pleadings. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., and NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges causes of action for HBOR and UCL violations. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future.
Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Atty. Vivian Lerche (415-680-5731) appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party Ferdinand Posas. No other apperances.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing that the application was complete (CC 2923.6(h)) and to allege damages; demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: unlawful/unfair/fraudulent prongs. Demurer is otherwise overruled. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Attorney, Arda Artinian of R.A. & Associates APC for plaintiff/opposing party
No Appearance by defendant/demurring party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing that the application was complete (CC 2923.6(h)) and to allege damages; demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: standing, and unlawful/unfair/fraudulent prongs. Demurer is otherwise overruled.
